content: Phase 1: Backend FY model, CRUD endpoints, closing logic, posting validation
Phase 1: POC test script - validate FY creation, posting validation, closing, reports
Phase 2: Frontend - Settings FY management UI
Phase 2: Frontend - Global FY selector in header
Phase 2: Update reports (TB/IS/GL) to filter by selected FY
Phase 2: Enforce FY validation on vouchers/invoices creation
Phase 2: End-to-end testing with testing agent
Phase 2: All user stories covered in Development and testing
Phase 3: Hardening - overlap prevention, org switching, backward compatibility
